backend/main.mo: Defines content types, audition forms, and state for a CMS-like backend with access control and content item management.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries describing frontend text-color updates and associated files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for various frontend files including sections, pages, and components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining theme variables for light/dark modes and global background/foreground styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the root React mount point and main script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing routing, layout, audio state, and section/page rendering.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Handles background audio playback with autoplay detection, fallback logic, and sound preference integration.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Provides UI controls for toggling sound, adjusting volume, and manually starting audio when autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access denied message with UI cards and alerts for unauthorized CMS users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity, handling authentication state and errors.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Shows a modal prompting authenticated users without a profile to enter and save their name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout section component with title, subtitle, icon, and styled container.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders the site footer with an extreme haunt warning and attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Implements the main site header with navigation, logo, mobile menu, and scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Displays a fullscreen video overlay with play, pause, mute, and close controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Displays a grid of audition perks with icons, titles, and descriptions using cards and badges.
Provides two signup cards for scare actor and dancer auditions, each triggering callbacks when clicked.
Implements a dancer audition form dialog with authentication gating, validation, and submission handling.
Implements a scare actor audition form dialog with login requirement, field validation, and submission logic.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Renders the auditions section with warnings, role info, images, and audition signup dialogs.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Shows the Clown Town interior section with an image, title, and descriptive text.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Renders a section listing food booths with images, pricing alerts, and buttons to view individual booth pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Displays haunted house cards with images, descriptions, and wait-time info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Implements the homepage hero with background video, logo, marketing text, and a button that scrolls to auditions.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Handles an intro video player with autoplay logic, fullscreen support, mute toggle, and error fallback.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Shows a procession feature card with an image and descriptive text about the 6pm parade.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Provides operating hours, ticket information, and rules/warnings in multiple styled info cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Displays merch categories, a featured booth image, and a filterable grid of merch product cards with error handling for images.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Renders a grid of scare zone cards with generated images, names, taglines, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Shows preview cards for selected haunted houses with images, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Lists live shows with optional season badges and image loading fallback support.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a media carousel with images/videos, autoplay, fullscreen support, and slide navigation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Teases two upcoming 2027 haunted houses with themed cards and descriptive text.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Shows a simple announcement card hinting at future content.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming events with images, dates, and descriptions, including image error handling.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Renders layered animated horror-themed background effects including fire, smoke, chainsaws, blood, and noise.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports detailed content definitions for various themed food booths including descriptions and menus.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps names of haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, shows, events, and auditions to generated image paths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Defines a list of haunted house attractions with names, taglines, descriptions, and optional sub-scenes and locations.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Provides a small list of merch shops with basic item descriptions and prices plus a general note.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines merch product interfaces, category metadata, and a full catalog of hoodie, hat, shirt, poster, and plushie products.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports detailed scare zone definitions including names, taglines, descriptions, and null locations.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Provides title, subtitle, description, and image path for the Schoolhouse haunted house preview content.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Lists show attractions with descriptions and whether they run only during haunt season.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Defines slide items for an image/video slider along with a title and subtitle for the feature.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Contains upcoming event entries with names, descriptions, and associated date information.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: React hook that fetches audition links from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Provides mutation hooks to submit scare actor and dancer audition forms by mapping minimal UI data to backend structures.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch caller role, admin status, and user profile using an actor and identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Manages autoplaying a video element, handling browser playback restrictions and offering play/pause controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Offers React Query hooks to fetch, create, update, delete, and seed content items via the actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Provides fullscreen state management and helpers to enter, exit, or toggle fullscreen for a referenced element.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context and provider handling identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
Supplies hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule, invalidating related queries on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Stores and updates sound preferences in localStorage with helpers to adjust enabled state and volume.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind-based global styles, theme variables, dark mode, and custom horror‑themed effects.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Contains helpers to format dates, content types, and type‑specific fields for display.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Displays audition information with loading, error states, and dynamic links fetched via a custom hook.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Renders a filterable, date-grouped event calendar with hash-based navigation and item detail dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Shows a detailed sneak peek for the Clown Town haunted house using static content and generated imagery.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS for managing content items and schedules, including CRUD operations and seeding capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Presents a Hell Hole haunted house preview plus an additional themed scenic section with imagery and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Displays details for the Laser Hell scare zone with image, location, and description, handling missing-zone fallback.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Shows a sneak peek of the Schoolhouse attraction with static image and descriptive content.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Renders the Sharks Hell food booth page with image, description, and menu, including a back button that scrolls to the booths section.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Renders the Slider Doom food booth page with booth details, image, and menu, plus navigation back to the booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Displays a haunted house sneak peek page for Toys Come to Play with header image, description, and a back-to-home button.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Provides utilities for comparing dates, iterating to next dates, and expanding date ranges into individual date keys.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Implements utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session-based parameters for routing and state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, shadows, animations, and container settings for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing the haunted event site and a feature request to make all visible text white without altering backgrounds.
